zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues I de REYNEL於大約1070年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾時，他的父親Thibaud I de REYNEL27歲，母親Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER13歲。他於大約1110年與Hedwige de Montreuil結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1127年享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues I de REYNEL于大约1070年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾时，他的父亲Thibaud I de REYNEL27岁，母亲Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER13岁。他于大约1110年与Hedwige de Montreuil结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1127年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: REYNEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from Rein, a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name beginning with ragin ‘counsel, advice’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues I de REYNEL was born about 1070, in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Thibaud I de REYNEL, was 27 and his mother, Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, was 13. He married Hedwige de Montreuil about 1110. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1127, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues I de REYNEL est né environ 1070, à Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Thibaud I de REYNEL, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Hedwige de Montreuil environ 1110. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1127, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues I de REYNEL um 1070 in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaud I de REYNEL 27 und seine Mutter Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER 13. Er hat um 1110 Hedwige de Montreuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1127 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de REYNEL è nato il circa 1070 nel Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaud I de REYNEL, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Hedwige de Montreuil circa 1110. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1127, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues I de REYNELが約1070年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネルで生まれた時，父Thibaud I de REYNELは27歳，母Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIERは13歳であった。約1110年にHedwige de Montreuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1127年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues I de REYNEL(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 리넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaud I de REYNEL(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 Hedwige de Montreuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1127년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.environ 1070–vers 1127: tany ho any amin'ny 1070–tany ho any amin'ny 1127

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de REYNEL nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Thibaud I de REYNEL, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwige de Montreuil aproximadamente 1110. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1127, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues I de REYNEL родился около 1070 г. в местности ринель, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaud I de REYNEL было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwige de Montreuil около 1110 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1127 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.environ 1070–vers 1127: e tusa o le 1070–e tusa o le 1127

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues I de REYNEL nació aproximadamente 1070, en Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Thibaud I de REYNEL, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Irmentrude de ROUCY de MONTDIDIER, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Hedwige de Montreuil aproximadamente 1110. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1127, a la edad de 59 años.
